title: Testnet-Only Account
content: All operations restricted to testnet.binance.vision. No production access.

title: Sub-Account Isolation
content: Dedicated sub-account for automated trading. No shared accounts.

title: IP Allowlist Requirement
content: API keys restricted to known IP addresses. No wildcard IPs.

title: Read Permission
content: Required for balance, position, and order status queries.

title: Order Create Permission
content: Required for order submission. Scoped to allowed symbols only.

title: Order Cancel Permission
content: Required for order cancellation. Must be idempotent.

title: Balance Read Permission
content: Required for account balance queries. Read-only.

title: Withdraw Permission Forbidden
content: Withdraw permission must not be granted. Any key with withdraw must be revoked.

title: Margin/Borrow Forbidden
content: Margin and borrow permissions forbidden unless explicitly approved by risk review.

title: Symbol Allowlist
content: Only approved symbols allowed. Default: empty (no symbols).

title: Notional Cap
content: Per-order notional cap. Default: 0 (no orders). Requires explicit approval to increase.

title: Daily Order Cap
content: Maximum orders per day. Default: 0. Requires explicit approval to increase.

title: Manual Freeze Procedure
content: Operator can freeze all trading immediately. Freeze requires manual unfreeze.
